LanguageData.KT_Base_t0_turret.label: Basic Defense Technology
LanguageData.KT_Base_t0_turret.description: Unlock the technology protocol, we will be permitted to construct basic defensive turrets.\n\nDid you know these turrets were once used by us to prevent food in warehouses from being stolen by small rats in the Noston trenches. — Light Cruiser β
LanguageData.KT_Base_t1_turret.label: Advanced Defense Technology
LanguageData.KT_Base_t1_turret.description: The ancients said, if you want to keep cake from being stolen when left outside for five minutes, the best way is to surround it with defensive installations.\n\nYou should know your actions will be scorned by those serious history enthusiasts, right? They'll point out that your equipment's power is significantly less than historical records, and bombard you with messages until you change it. — Eugen
LanguageData.KT_Base_t2_Artillery_turret.label: Kinetic Artillery
LanguageData.KT_Base_t2_Artillery_turret.description: Solid shells, deep barrels - always provide more sense of security than those elusive energy weapons.\n\nThe structure inside the turret? Actually they're all inflatable models... We just need to restore the appearance, firing can be handled by hyperdimensional links. — Deep Sea Tirpitz
LanguageData.KT_Base_t2_energy_turret.label: Energy Artillery
LanguageData.KT_Base_t2_energy_turret.description: Light, elegant, dazzling - these words can all describe our energy weapons. The dumb, big, black, and crude kinetic weapons are too barbaric.\n\nMy last vacation? You mean when I simulated being the God-Emperor in the Warhammer universe? The vacation was too short, had to get up from the toilet halfway through~ — Deep Sea Tirpitz
LanguageData.KT_Base_t2_rail_turret.label: Railgun
LanguageData.KT_Base_t2_rail_turret.description: Can opener神器.\n\nI became the UF flagship through self-struggle, but also had to consider the course of history, and more importantly, the Supreme Flagship's preference — U96
LanguageData.KT_Base_t3_Artillery_turret.label: Advanced Kinetic Artillery
LanguageData.KT_Base_t3_Artillery_turret.description: Bigger shells with thicker barrels.\n\nCompared to those stellar naval guns that use meters as caliber units, this thing is like a toothpick. — Taihou
LanguageData.KT_Base_t3_energy_turret.label: Advanced Energy Artillery
LanguageData.KT_Base_t3_energy_turret.description: We need more batteries to support these energy weapons!\n\nStop playing, it's your turn to be on duty. — Deep Sea Bismarck
LanguageData.KT_Base_t3_rail_turret.label: Advanced Railgun
LanguageData.KT_Base_t3_rail_turret.description: If one shot doesn't penetrate, fire two.\n\nThey definitely don't know that the so-called vaccine against the UF Perfection Instrument not only doesn't work but also has a bunch of additional Debuffs — Ella
LanguageData.KT_Base_t4_Artillery_turret.label: Ultimate Kinetic Artillery
LanguageData.KT_Base_t4_Artillery_turret.description: The final protocol for artillery weapons. In a way, being annihilated by these weapons is also an honor.\n\nThose people upstairs are really useless, they actually look down on my artillery designs! In my concept, as long as the barrel is long enough, we can directly fire into the enemy's command headquarters and end the battle instantly. But they ignore me, isn't that infuriating? Really! — Cabot
LanguageData.KT_Base_t4_energy_turret.label: Ultimate Energy Artillery
LanguageData.KT_Base_t4_energy_turret.description: We do not allow full-power laser weapons to be used on planets - any one of them could easily burn up the entire planetary atmosphere! Therefore, you must first sign a disclaimer.\n\nJoin UF to get 72 catgirls — Vestal
LanguageData.KT_Shield.label: Shield Technology
LanguageData.KT_Shield.description: My bedroom must have shields installed, otherwise I can't sleep soundly.\n\nThe outcome of the black monoliths? The tea powder in your cup is made from them. — London
LanguageData.KT_UFGenerator_tech.label: Super Reactor
LanguageData.KT_UFGenerator_tech.description: The increasing power demand from various defensive weapons and facilities requires new energy acquisition methods to be put on the agenda.\n\nI don't need scientific principles to build these things. As long as I'm connected to the hyperdimensional network, the rest is just like molding clay into shapes I like. — Deep Sea Tirpitz
LanguageData.KT_Base_Workbench.label: Pact Nation Standard Equipment
LanguageData.KT_Base_Workbench.description: All citizens of the United Fleet are shipgirls who use ship equipment for combat, hence they don't use individual weapons. However, historical records show that the United Fleet had numerous subordinate pact nations, for which a batch of equipment was specially developed to enhance their domestic security. To prevent theft and leakage by criminals, the power was strictly limited to ensure the personal and property safety of United shipgirls.\n\nI put a lot of effort into fabricating these weapons. I should have restored them according to historical records. Can those history enthusiasts stop DMing me? — Deep Sea Tirpitz
LanguageData.KT_Base_t1_weapon.label: Pact Nation Basic Firearms
LanguageData.KT_Base_t1_weapon.description: Light weapons extensively equipped by pact nations.\n\nIf I catch anyone using laser gun batteries to charge their phones again, they can forget about this month's salary. — A Pact Nation Weapons Production Team Leader
LanguageData.KT_Base_t2_weapon.label: Pact Nation Heavy Firearms
LanguageData.KT_Base_t2_weapon.description: Weapons used by pact nations' heavy firepower units. From this level onward, both users and the firearms themselves will be strictly monitored, because if leaked into the hands of criminals and used against the United, the excessive weapon power could leave stains on the shipgirls' clothes.\n\nSometimes we really need pact nation troops. After all, we're only equipped with naval guns and can't do embroidery needle work. — A United Army Sergeant
LanguageData.KT_Base_t3_weapon.label: Pact Nation Heavy Firepower
LanguageData.KT_Base_t3_weapon.description: Heavy weapons designed for Pact Nation elite veterans, with high weight and usually EMP extreme damage.\n\nOne shot kills a whole group, I guess I got to experience a budget version of being a shipgirl. — A Pact Nation heavy firepower soldier
LanguageData.KT_Base_t3_plasma_weapon.label: Pact Nation Plasma Weapons
LanguageData.KT_Base_t3_plasma_weapon.description: Although Pact Nation soldiers' laser guns are also energy weapons, compared to plasma they're just flashlights.\n\n★☆☆☆☆ Terrorists burned my dress. — A UF shipgirl travel review
LanguageData.KT_Base_t4_weapon.label: Pact Nation Precision Firearms (Previous level not yet completed)
LanguageData.KT_Base_t4_weapon.description: Only pact nation warriors who have proven their loyalty to the United Fleet can obtain precision weapons personally designed by United shipgirls rather than AI-generated.\n\nHope you like the weapon I designed. — Washington, Class 2-3, United Capital Elementary School
LanguageData.KT_Base_armor.label: Pact Nation Power Armor
LanguageData.KT_Base_armor.description: Different Pact Nations have vastly different armor designs due to species variations, and this model is designed for humanoid creatures. Our hyperdimensional entity has specially installed a shoulder cannon for it, using the same shell compression technology as shipgirl equipment, making the user a budget version of a shipgirl.\n\nI told you, the turret structure is just decoration. — Deep Sea Tirpitz
LanguageData.KT_Base_backpack.label: Iron Halo Damage Absorption Field
LanguageData.KT_Base_backpack.description: A damage-absorption type field shield developed to enhance the battlefield survivability of Pact Nation infantry, integrated into a compact backpack.\n\nI can take at least three shots. — Pact Nation Soldier
LanguageData.KT_Maintenance_Station_tech.label: Nanotechnology Maintenance Station
LanguageData.KT_Maintenance_Station_tech.description: This structure is a marvel - it can not only repair items and buildings, but also increase their durability.\n\nEven the durability of candy boxes has been multiplied several times, making them impossible to open! — Firefly
